--- Performance Metrics (UNDER THROTTLING) --- ┌─────────┬───────────────────┐ │ (index) │ Values │ ├─────────┼───────────────────┤ │ dns │ [33m72.5[39m │ │ tcp │ [33m88.39999997615814[39m │ │ ssl │ [33m87.89999997615814[39m │ │ ttfb │ [33m697.1000000238419[39m │ │ total │ [33m0[39m │ └─────────┴───────────────────┘ Resource: https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/getconfig/ab... TTFB: 283.72ms

testcase.name: E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable

property.name: Test Data
property.value: Name: user2540 | Email: qa_20260317T152421302Z_828@example.com | Password: Test1234

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:7:5 › E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable › Sign up new user
Error: expect(locator).toBeHidden() failed
Locator: locator('button[data-qa="create-account"]') Expected: hidden Received: visible Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeHidden" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('button[data-qa="create-account"]') 8 × locator resolved to <button type="submit" class="btn btn-default" data-qa="create-account">Create Account</button> - unexpected value "visible"
at ..\pages\signupPage.ts:107

testcase.name: C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

property.name: fail
property.value: BUG-###: Race condition returns 200 OK

failure.message: Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:7:5 C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

testcase.failure:

property.name: skip
property.value: CDP metrics only work in Chromium

testcase.name: E2E-14: Place Order: Register while Checkout @critical
Place Order tests › E2E-15: Place Order: Register before Checkout @critical

property.name: Test Data
property.value: Name: user8978 | Email: qa_20260317T152623494Z_549@example.com | Password: Test1234

failure.message: Checkout.spec.ts:31:5 E2E-15: Place Order: Register before Checkout @critical

testcase.failure: [webkit] › e2e\Checkout.spec.ts:31:5 › Place Order tests › E2E-15: Place Order: Register before Checkout @critical Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
